reasoning: Koren, this workout addresses your lactate clearance limiter by presenting stress similar to what you'll face on the Alpine Loop climb. Your last ride shows room to push harder; let's build fatigue resistance while focusing on maintaining power closer to your target for the event.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 5 minutes over (242-256W) and 3 minutes under (201-218W)

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
